common.warning_text: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.

profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name
profile.resend_verification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

delete_account.title: Delete account
delete_account.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
delete_account.warning_text: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
delete_account.confirm_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete_account.confirm_description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Manage your teams and team memberships
teams.no_teams: You don't belong to any teams yet.
teams.settings_description: Update your team name and settings
teams.name: Team name
teams.members_description: Manage who belongs to this team
teams.pending_description: Invitations that haven't been accepted yet

create.title: Create a new team
create.description: Create a new team to collaborate with others.

invite.title: Invite a team member
invite.description: Send an invitation to join this team.

remove.title: Remove team member
remove.description: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this team?

cancel.title: Cancel invitation
cancel.description: Are you sure you want to cancel the invitation for {{email}}?

delete.title: Are you sure?
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the team "{{name}}".

password.title: Update password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

two_factor.title: Two-factor authentication
two_factor.enabled_text: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
two_factor.disabled_text: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.

recovery_codes.title: 2FA recovery codes
recovery_codes.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
recovery_codes.warning: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click Regenerate codes above.

modal.enabled_description: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
modal.verify_description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
modal.enable_description: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app

confirm_password.title: Confirm password
confirm_password.layout_description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.layout_description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

login.title: Log in
login.layout_description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Register
register.layout_description: Enter your details below to create your account

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.layout_description: Please enter your new password below

recovery.title: Recovery code
recovery.description: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.

auth_code.title: Authentication code
auth_code.description: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.

verify_email.title: Email verification
verify_email.layout_description: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
verify_email.link_sent_success: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
